Box.Box:
[color=#1a8a00]> SYSTEM BOOT SEQUENCE INITIATED...[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]> Establishing network uplink...[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]> Synchronizing wasteland registry...[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]> Loading operational directives...[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]> Authenticating resident access...[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]STATUS: CONNECTION ESTABLISHED[/color][/bold]
[color=#1a8a00]— VAULT-TEC NOTICE: A BETTER COMMUNITY THROUGH ORDER. —[/color]

[color=#c8f0c8]A Fallout-themed medium roleplay environment where every action has [color=#ffb000]consequences.[/color][/color]
[color=#c8f0c8]Survival depends on:[/color]
- [bold][color=#39ff14]YOUR ALLIANCES[/color][/bold] - [bold][color=#39ff14]YOUR DECISIONS[/color][/bold] - [bold][color=#39ff14]YOUR ABILITY TO ADAPT[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]Administrative oversight is minimal. [color=#ffb000]The story belongs to the players.[/color][/color]
[color=#1a8a00]Review the operational directives below before entering the wasteland.[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]— VAULT-TEC NOTICE: A BETTER COMMUNITY THROUGH ORDER. —[/color]

[color=#1a8a00]> LOADING COMMUNITY DIRECTIVES...[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]> VERIFYING RESIDENT ACCESS...[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]STATUS: TERMINAL ACTIVE — ACCESS LEVEL: PUBLIC[/color][/bold]

[bold][color=#ffb000]01 — RESPECT THE COMMUNITY[/color][/bold] [color=#c8f0c8]Toxic behavior, harassment, or actions meant to ruin others are not tolerated.[/color]
[bold][color=#ffb000]02 — PLAY FOR STORY[/color][/bold] [color=#c8f0c8]Medium Roleplay environment. Create story and interaction — not victory at any cost.[/color]
[bold][color=#ffb000]03 — NO METAGAMING[/color][/bold] [color=#c8f0c8]OOC information from Discord, streams, or ghosting may not influence IC actions.[/color]
[bold][color=#ffb000]04 — NO GRIEFING[/color][/bold] [color=#c8f0c8]Actions intended only to disrupt gameplay without roleplay reasoning are prohibited.[/color]
[bold][color=#ffb000]05 — STAY IN CHARACTER[/color][/bold] [color=#c8f0c8]Characters must fit the Fallout setting and maintain immersion within the wasteland.[/color]
[bold][color=#ffb000]06 — FOLLOW ESCALATION[/color][/bold] [color=#c8f0c8]Dialogue should precede lethal force unless an immediate threat exists.[/color]
[bold][color=#ffb000]07 — NO CHEATS OR EXPLOITS[/color][/bold] [color=#c8f0c8]Do not abuse bugs, tools, or mechanics. Report issues through official channels.[/color]
[bold][color=#ffb000]08 — VALUE YOUR LIFE[/color][/bold] [color=#c8f0c8]FearRP applies when revived in captivity. Escape attempts require admin approval via Ahelp.[/color]
[bold][color=#1a8a00]▼ FULL DIRECTIVES BELOW — SCROLL TO CONTINUE ▼[/color][/bold]
[color=#1a8a00]— VAULT-TEC NOTICE: A BETTER COMMUNITY THROUGH ORDER. —[/color]

[bold][color=#39ff14]WELCOME, RESIDENT.[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]MISFITS: NUCLEAR WASTELAND OPERATES AS A MEDIUM ROLEPLAY FALLOUT ENVIRONMENT. THE GOAL IS NOT ONLY ENGAGING GAMEPLAY, BUT THE CREATION OF [color=#ffb000]MEMORABLE STORIES SHAPED BY PLAYER CHOICE.[/color][/color]
[color=#c8f0c8]THE WASTELAND IS HARSH AND CONSEQUENCES MATTER. YOUR SURVIVAL DEPENDS ON YOUR ACTIONS, YOUR ALLIANCES, AND YOUR JUDGMENT.[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]ADMINISTRATIVE INTERVENTION IS RARE AND RESERVED FOR RULE ENFORCEMENT, NOT STORY RESCUE.[/color]

[bold][color=#c8f0c8]THIS IS A COLLABORATIVE ENVIRONMENT.[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]TOXICITY, EGO PLAY, AND BEHAVIOR DESIGNED TO RUIN OTHERS' ENJOYMENT ARE NOT TOLERATED.[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]PLAY TO CREATE STORY, NOT TO "WIN"[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]RESPECT ADMINISTRATORS AND DEVELOPERS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]COOPERATE DURING ADMIN INTERACTIONS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]DO NOT DISCONNECT DURING ACTIVE TICKETS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]REPORT TECHNICAL ISSUES PROMPTLY[/color]
[color=#ffb000]⚠ ADMINISTRATION MAY INTERVENE IN SITUATIONS NOT EXPLICITLY COVERED IF BEHAVIOR DAMAGES THE COMMUNITY OR THE ROUND.[/color]
[color=#c8f0c8]PUNISHMENTS ARE ISSUED AT STAFF DISCRETION BASED ON SEVERITY, CONTEXT, AND HISTORY.[/color]

[color=#c8f0c8]GRIEFING IS ANY ACTION TAKEN PRIMARILY TO DISRUPT GAMEPLAY OR DEGRADE THE EXPERIENCE OF OTHERS WITHOUT MEANINGFUL IN-CHARACTER REASONING.[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]EXAMPLES INCLUDE:[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]DELIBERATE DESTRUCTION WITH NO RP JUSTIFICATION[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]TRAP PLACEMENT INTENDED ONLY TO FRUSTRATE[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]LARGE-SCALE DISRUPTION WITHOUT NARRATIVE BASIS[/color]
[color=#ffb000]⚠ LACK OF INTENT DOES NOT ALWAYS EXCUSE LARGE-SCALE DAMAGE. IF YOUR ACTIONS SEVERELY IMPACT THE ROUND WITHOUT REASONABLE RP LOGIC, THEY MAY BE TREATED AS GRIEFING.[/color]

[bold][color=#39ff14]2.1 METAGAMING[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]USING OUT-OF-CHARACTER KNOWLEDGE TO INFLUENCE IN-CHARACTER ACTIONS IS PROHIBITED.[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]PROHIBITED INFORMATION SOURCES:[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]DISCORD[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]STREAMS OR GHOSTING[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]OOC CHAT[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]EXTERNAL COMMUNICATION[/color]
[color=#c8f0c8]Streaming is allowed, but [color=#ffb000]responsibility for information leaks lies with the streamer.[/color][/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]2.2 MULTIACCOUNTING[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]MULTIPLE ACCOUNTS IN THE SAME ROUND ARE FORBIDDEN[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]BAN EVASION IS STRICTLY PROHIBITED[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]ALTERNATE ACCOUNTS TO AVOID PUNISHMENT HISTORY ARE NOT ALLOWED[/color]
[bold][color=#ff2200]⚠ VIOLATIONS MAY RESULT IN PERMANENT BANS.[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#39ff14]2.3 EXPLOITS[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]NO CHEATS, MACROS, OR THIRD-PARTY TOOLS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]NO INTENTIONAL BUG ABUSE[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]NO DELIBERATE SERVER STRAIN[/color]
[color=#c8f0c8]REPORT DISCOVERED BUGS THROUGH OFFICIAL CHANNELS.[/color]

[color=#c8f0c8]CHARACTERS MUST FIT THE FALLOUT SETTING IN TONE, BEHAVIOR, AND NAMING.[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]3.1 CHARACTER IDENTITY[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]NO MEME NAMES OR REAL-WORLD REFERENCES[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]NO REUSE OF DEAD OR PERMANENTLY IMPRISONED CHARACTERS WITHOUT APPROVAL[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]ADMINISTRATION MAY REQUIRE NAME CHANGES[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]3.2 COMMUNICATION[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]DO NOT BREAK IMMERSION WITH MECHANICAL TERMS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]KEEP OOC TOPICS OUT OF IC CHANNELS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]OOC CHANNELS MUST REMAIN RESPECTFUL[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]3.3 ATMOSPHERE[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]DO NOT REFERENCE ADMINS OR GAME SYSTEMS IN CHARACTER[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]PROVIDE IC REASONS FOR ABSENCE WHEN POSSIBLE[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]3.4 KNOWLEDGE LIMITS[/color][/bold]
[color=#ffb000]YOUR CHARACTER IS NOT ALL-KNOWING. DO NOT REFERENCE TECHNOLOGY OR KNOWLEDGE YOUR CHARACTER WOULD NOT REALISTICALLY POSSESS.[/color]

[bold][color=#ff2200]⚠ EXPLICIT ERP IS PROHIBITED IN ALL FORMS.[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]Light romantic interaction such as flirting, hugging, or kissing is permitted if:[/color]
- [bold][color=#39ff14]NON-EXPLICIT[/color][/bold] - [bold][color=#39ff14]CONSENSUAL[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]IF STAFF INSTRUCT YOU TO STOP BEHAVIOR NEAR THE BOUNDARY, YOU MUST COMPLY IMMEDIATELY.[/color]
[bold][color=#ff2200]VIOLATIONS MAY RESULT IN REMOVAL.[/color][/bold]

[color=#c8f0c8]CHARACTERS WHO DISCONNECT MAY NOT BE DIRECTLY HARMED.[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]▶ ALLOWED[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]LOOTING SSD CHARACTERS[/color]
[bold][color=#ff2200]▶ PROHIBITED[/color][/bold]
- [color=#ff2200]KILLING SSD CHARACTERS[/color] - [color=#ff2200]KIDNAPPING SSD CHARACTERS[/color]
[color=#ffb000]DISCONNECTING DURING ACTIVE COMBAT REMOVES THIS PROTECTION. SSD PLAYERS INSIDE FACTION BASES DURING RAIDS ARE NOT PROTECTED.[/color]

[bold][color=#39ff14]6.1 ESCALATION[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]DIALOGUE MUST PRECEDE LETHAL FORCE.[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]REQUIREMENTS:[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]FACE-TO-FACE ESCALATION[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]CLEAR DEMAND GIVEN[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]TIME TO RESPOND[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]EXCEPTIONS:[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]ACTIVE FIREFIGHTS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]IMMEDIATE THREATS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]WILDLIFE[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]FACTION WARFARE[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]6.2 ROBBERY[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]DO NOT REMOVE ALL SURVIVAL ITEMS[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]NON-RESISTING VICTIMS MUST LIVE[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]RESISTANCE SHIFTS RESPONSIBILITY[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]6.3 FACTION WARFARE[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]FACTIONS BEGIN NEUTRAL[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]ONLY LEADERS MAY DECLARE WAR[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]WAR BEGINS FIVE MINUTES AFTER FACE-TO-FACE DECLARATION[/color]
[bold][color=#ff2200]⚠ KILLING DIPLOMATS OR SURRENDERED INDIVIDUALS IS FORBIDDEN.[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#39ff14]6.4 EARLY RAIDS[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]FACTION BASES MAY NOT BE RAIDED WITHIN THE FIRST [color=#ffb000]30 MINUTES.[/color][/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]6.5 FACTION EQUIPMENT AND IMPERSONATION[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]ALL FACTIONS MAY BE LOOTED OF ARMOR, UNIFORMS, WEAPONS, AND ITEMS.[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]ANY PERSON IMPERSONATING A FACTION MAY BE ESCALATED UPON[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]WEARING A FACTION'S ARMOR GIVES THAT FACTION PERMISSION TO ESCALATE[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]6.6 FACTION RAIDS[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]ALL FACTION RAIDS MUST BE AHELPED FOR APPROVAL BEFORE COMMENCING.[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]RAIDS MUST HAVE A GOOD ROLEPLAY REASON[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]FACTION LEADERS MUST ANNOUNCE THE RAID VIA RADIO[/color]
[color=#ffb000]IF DENIED OR NO RESPONSE IS GIVEN — THE ATTACKING PARTY MUST LEAVE.[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]6.7 CONFLICT INTERVENTION[/color][/bold]
[color=#c8f0c8]PLAYERS WHO CLEARLY SURRENDER MAY NOT BE EXECUTED IF NO CROSSFIRE EXISTS.[/color]
[color=#c8f0c8]FACTION OR GANG MEMBERS WITH IDENTICAL UNIFORMS MAY ASSIST ALLIES IN ACTIVE CONFLICT.[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]6.8 ROUND-REMOVAL (RR)[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]ROUND-REMOVALS MUST BE APPROPRIATE TO ESCALATION (ONE FIGHT DOES NOT EQUAL RR)[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]KILL, LEAVE THE BODY, AND GIVE CHARACTERS A CHANCE FOR A STORY[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]INTENTIONAL GIBBING OR BEHEADING FOLLOWS RULE #1: DON'T BE A DICK[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]FACTIONS PRIORITIZE REVIVAL (WITHIN REASON) AND IMPRISON/ENSLAVE (INCLUSIVE TO TOWN, NCR, LEGION, AND BOS)[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]EXAMPLE:[/color]
[color=#ffb000]NCR LETS FOTA KNOW THE LOCATION OF BODIES AFTER A BATTLE IF THEY DO NOT HAVE PROPER RESOURCES TO REVIVE/IMPRISON.[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]6.9 OUTLAWS[/color][/bold]
- [color=#c8f0c8]OUTLAWS MUST PROVIDE RP FIRST[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]THEIR SOLE PURPOSE SHOULD NOT JUST BE MASS MURDER[/color]

- [color=#c8f0c8]PLAYERS MAY NOT REJOIN ON THE SAME CHARACTER TO BYPASS DEATH[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]REVIVED CHARACTERS FORGET THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THEIR DEATH[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]KNOWLEDGE FROM PREVIOUS ROUNDS MAY NOT BE USED FOR ADVANTAGE[/color]

[color=#c8f0c8]FEARRP APPLIES WHEN A PLAYER IS REVIVED IN A SECURE LOCATION.[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]EXAMPLE SCENARIO:[/color]
[color=#ffb000]LEGION KILLS A BOS PALADIN AND REVIVES THEM AT THEIR CAMP. THE PALADIN MUST NOW VALUE THEIR LIFE AND FOLLOW FEARRP.[/color]
- [color=#c8f0c8]ESCAPE ATTEMPTS REQUIRE ADMIN APPROVAL VIA AHELP[/color] - [color=#c8f0c8]FAILED ATTEMPTS REQUIRE NEW APPROVAL[/color]
[color=#ffb000]IF YOU DO NOT WISH TO RP AS A SLAVE OR PRISONER, YOU ARE PERMITTED TO GHOST. HOWEVER, THAT CHARACTER IS NOW CONSIDERED KILLED AND IS NOT PROTECTED UNDER SSD RULES.[/color]

[color=#c8f0c8]PROJECT LEADERSHIP RETAINS FINAL AUTHORITY IN RULE INTERPRETATION.[/color]
[bold][color=#ffb000]SERVER EXPECTATION: 17+[/color][/bold]

[color=#1a8a00]> ALL DIRECTIVES LOADED SUCCESSFULLY[/color]
[color=#1a8a00]> END OF FILE: COMMUNITY_DIRECTIVES[/color]
[bold][color=#39ff14]TERMINAL STANDING BY[/color][/bold]
[color=#1a8a00]— VAULT-TEC NOTICE: A BETTER COMMUNITY THROUGH ORDER. —[/color]
